name: White Gravy
recipeIngredient: 2 cups soy milk or rice milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together 1 cup of soy milk (or rice milk) with the soy sauce and seasonings.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining 1 cup of soy milk or rice milk with the cornstarch until well combined.
3. Gradually stir the cornstarch mixture into the soy sauce mixture, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
4. Heat over low heat for a few minutes, stirring frequently until the gravy thickens.
5. Remove from heat and serve immediately if the rest of the dinner isn't ready yet.
Note: The original recipe calls for adding the cornstarch in 1/4 cup water, but for a gravy, you don't need extra liquid.
